question: Dieu 249 Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017 quy dinh ve toi gi?
expected_answer: Dieu 249 quy dinh ve toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy.
expected_context: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 249

question: Dieu 255 Bo luat Hinh su quy dinh ve hanh vi nao lien quan den ma tuy?
expected_answer: Dieu 255 quy dinh ve toi to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy.
expected_context: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Dieu 255

question: Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021 quy dinh nhung hinh thuc cai nghien nao?
expected_answer: Luat quy dinh cai nghien tu nguyen tai gia dinh, tai cong dong, tai co so cai nghien va cai nghien bat buoc tai co so cai nghien.
expected_context: Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021, Chuong V

question: Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021 tap trung dieu chinh nhung noi dung lon nao?
expected_answer: Van ban tap trung vao phong ngua, dau tranh toi pham ma tuy, quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy va cong tac cai nghien.

question: Nghi dinh 105/2021 co vai tro gi doi voi Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021?
expected_answer: Nghi dinh 105/2021 la van ban huong dan thi hanh Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021.

question: Thong tu lien tich ve danh muc chat ma tuy va tien chat dung de lam gi?
expected_answer: Thong tu dung de quy dinh va cap nhat danh muc chat ma tuy va tien chat phuc vu quan ly nha nuoc.
expected_context: Thong tu lien tich ve danh muc chat ma tuy va tien chat

question: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017 co chuong rieng nao ve cac toi pham ma tuy?
expected_answer: Bo luat Hinh su co chuong rieng quy dinh cac toi pham ve ma tuy.
expected_context: Bo luat Hinh su 2015 sua doi 2017, Chuong ve cac toi pham ma tuy

question: Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021 co lien quan gi den cong tac cai nghien bat buoc?
expected_answer: Luat quy dinh co che cai nghien bat buoc tai co so cai nghien va cac nguyen tac quan ly lien quan.
expected_context: Luat Phong chong ma tuy 2021, Chuong V

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1019053, nhung ai bi nhac ten trong vu an ma tuy o TP.HCM?
expected_answer: Bai bao nhac den ca si Long Nhat va Son Ngoc Minh trong vu an ma tuy o TP.HCM.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1019053, Long Nhat va Son Ngoc Minh bi khoi to ve toi gi?
expected_answer: Hai nguoi bi khoi to ve toi to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1014013, nhung nghe si nao duoc nhac den khi noi ve viec lien quan ma tuy?
expected_answer: Bai bao nhac den Son Ngoc Minh, Long Nhat, Miu Le, Le Hang, An Tay va Chi Dan.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1014013, Andrea Aybar con duoc goi bang ten nao?
expected_answer: Andrea Aybar duoc goi la An Tay va ten Viet la Nguyen Thi An.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1014013, Chi Dan lien quan den vu viec gi?
expected_answer: Chi Dan bi phat hien duong tinh voi ma tuy va bi dieu tra trong vu viec lien quan ma tuy.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1019818, NhiKolai Dinh lien quan den su viec nao?
expected_answer: Bai bao de cap NhiKolai Dinh bi bat trong chuyen an ma tuy o khu Ma Lang, Quan 1.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1019849, Nguyen Cong Tri lien quan den vu viec nao?
expected_answer: Bai bao de cap nha thiet ke Nguyen Cong Tri bi bat vi lien quan den ma tuy.

question: Theo bai vtcnews_ar1020014, An Tay bi truy to ve nhung toi danh nao?
expected_answer: An Tay bi truy to ve toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy va to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy.
